title: cliffortia lepida
intro: Cliffortia lepida, a species of shrub, is a type of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. Cliffortia lepida has been found to have medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and antifungal properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, due to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. Cliffortia lepida is typically prepared for herbal use by drying and processing its leaves, roots, or stems, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures.
